specific_location: County Road 177.9 , 1/4 mile south of Clark Hill bend , above Reed Canyon
description: Adult male was AMGO size , tanager shape , reddish orange all over with dusky gray auriculars and grayish upper back , no wing bars , stout gray bill, dark lores. Adult female had a dull yellow throat , upper breast , forehead and tail , grayish auriculars , flanks and upper back , stout blackish bill , no wing bars , same size and jizz of male.Behaviors: both birds came into to a very short playback with the male perched on top of juniper and pinyon pines counter singing and acting territorialy .Call: Song sweeter than other tanagers with no hoarseness , similar to BHGR .Plumage: Adult
